item.title: Saturday Morning Animal Dump
item.dc:creator: Llamadanceparty3000

item.title: "Unions are great, so long as they don't ask for stuff or stand up to corporations"
item.description: "But but but..... a recession hurts all workers" Well Damn Jackie, sounds like to avoid a recession congress should have forced the billion dollar corporations to give employees a few sick days, rather than destroy a workers movement and force the railway employees to work without a single sick day, right in the middle of a global fucking pandemic. Absolutely insane how this is being portrayed as "workers vs the economy", rather than "workers vs greedy rail corporations who made more than 27 billion dollars last year" (originally posted by @AoShin on 2022-12-02 23:56:34)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: A devoted loyal bond between a fox and a dog. The orphaned wild Japanese fox has been with the dog since she was a kid. Despite having her own kids now , she never once left the dog ‘s side when the dog became sick , till the very end ….
item.dc:creator: MedicalScience

item.title: what are the odds?
item.description: Wife and I are checking our Secret Santas for this year and something just looks a little too familiar. Im commenting on how this woman sounds a lot like my wife and then I read the username and it's her. Guess SS this year is gonna be easy.
item.dc:creator: TheBloodyAustralianGovernment

item.title: It’s the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends. i'm back after a lengthy 3 day hiatus
to be fair, I’ve seen many English breakfasts that look absolutely incredible
this is by far Stevie's favorite image in this dump
I always knew Finland was cool
as is tradition
this old but those don’t really apply to me?
damnit, James. I trusted you
precarious
everyone loves snacks
mmm hmm
other burger places hate them
*birb
I feel like that’s the main way people hear about it
I’m a big GD fan so I love this
legend
comma isn’t necessary?
been a minute since I played GTA. New trailer next week?
since he was mentioned earlier... Stevie looking goofy tax
that's my set.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: If only there was some way to check the answer, some sort of book with text in it about mathematics
item.dc:creator: astronomypictures

item.title: Houses
item.description:
One of my dream houses
Another one
No, not this one. Frank doesn't like it.
If I was a chicken, yes
I dont
Yes, definitely
Hollow it out and I'll live in it with the wasps and birds
Yes. I am up for this social experiment.
This is bad
Never, don't tempt me like this
100 percent yes but I'm very concerned about structural integrity
Possibly. I'd rather be a ghost there though, seems very ghost-friendly
Yes. Maybe? Yes. Show me the inside.
Same as above but wildly different. Yes, ? yes maybe
Yes, very dreamy
Also dreamy but fence and paved garden is a different vibe, not for me
Man, my pullup game is gonna be so beyond!
I want to look at this beautiful creation every day so it would be a waste to live in it
This, or a lighthouse. That's the dream.
Don't mind me just kshing over this post
item.dc:creator: rhubarbarajam

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1042 (sea creepy edition)
item.description:
Dawn has come. The ancient sea has gone, but apparently, it's supposed to be crab Meme day, so here's some Ancient and modern Ocean creepy crawlies for you. Blame @BottomShelfVodka for this one.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hello. Good morning. Hi cutie."

item.title: I'm out of videos, you get what you dump 100
item.description: 100 dumps in, I feel blessed. 80000 glorious fake Internet points worth Babillions! Glory, accolades, goth girls and all a boy or girl could ever dream of in a short anonymous avatar life. Thank you all
